title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.020 - Governor to commission certain officers
text:
105.020.  Governor to commission certain officers. — The attorney general, prosecuting attorneys, and the circuit attorney for the city of St. Louis shall be commissioned by the governor, and shall hold their offices until their successors are elected, commissioned and qualified.
(RSMo 1939 § 12988, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11362; 1919 § 781; 1909 § 1042 
Effective 1-02-79
